description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a robust metallic frame and a dark blue and black color scheme accented by red wiring and silver metallic components. The barrel assembly is substantial, with two parallel cylindrical barrels and reinforced muzzle ends, suggesting a double-barrel configuration. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, with a padded butt and a contoured grip for stability. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical elements, including a visible chamber and a set of blue vent-like ridges on the upper housing. A forward grip is mounted beneath the barrels, enhancing control during firing. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes on the metal and polymer surfaces.
description: A futuristic, double-barreled shotgun with a full stock, blue and black body, red wiring, and metallic accents, featuring a forward grip and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the twin barrels, blue vented receiver, and the alignment of the stock and grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the double-barrel assembly, full stock, forward grip, and visible red wiring along the body.
description_view_2: Front view focusing on the twin barrel openings and the forward grip beneath, with the stock and receiver receding behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same double-barrel and stock features, with additional detail on the mechanical housing and wiring.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with reinforced muzzle ends and no visible ribbing or venting between barrels
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
